pi_items.source: Compared mathematically against explicit text coordinates in setup_task.sh, and verified with SIMBAD.
Verified against tol_deg threshold in verifier.py logic.
Verified against jwst_lensing_proposal.txt and verifier.py exposure time checks.
Verified against setup_task.sh slot 1 mapping to Luminance, and verifier.py filter checks.
Verified against setup_task.sh creation script, and export_result.sh parsing logic.

privileged_info_summary: I have verified that the task operates in a synthetic simulation environment using KStars and INDI. The target coordinates (Abell 1689: RA 13.1917h, Dec -1.3411°; Abell 2218: RA 16.5983h, Dec 66.2131°; Abell 370: RA 2.6647h, Dec -1.5767°) mathematically match the text instructions dynamically generated in the setup_task.sh jwst_lensing_proposal.txt and correspond to the real-world astrophysical coordinates of these galaxy clusters. The tolerance (0.25°), required exposure time (60s), required filter (1/Luminance), and base output directory (/home/ga/Lensing) explicitly match the configuration in setup_task.sh and the exact evaluation logic in verifier.py.
